positive: A minimalist, stylish illustration of a sleeping forest fawn and a whimsical bouquet of wildflowers (daisies, lavender, poppies) nestled in a patch of moss. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes of the animals and flora against a soft, gradient pastel background (sage green, sky blue, dusty lavender). Focus on simple, linework detail with areas of solid color fill (flat vector aesthetic). The style is elegant and storybook, highly adaptable for embroidery or screen printing. Perfect central symmetry, centered composition. Clean vector art style, studio lighting, high contrast between the silhouettes and background.
negative: photo, photography, realism, hyperdetailed, messy, artifacts, watermark, text, blurry, noise, grain, low resolution, ugly, poorly drawn, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy
